Meta.Purpose: POTOP (Project Over-The-Top Power) is a 3D roguelite turret defense game focusing on wave-based combat and strategic progression.
Meta.Architecture: Singleton-based Global State Management transitioning to Event-Driven Architecture (Event Broker).

Dependencies.Package: New Input System for player controls.
Legacy UI components used in current HUD.

CoreScenes.Scene: Main menu and lobby for turret selection.

Module.name: GameManager
Module.Responsibility: Singleton managing global state (HP, Score, GameState).

Module.name: GameHUD
Module.Responsibility: UI controller for real-time gameplay feedback.

File.Description: Data structures, stats, and game balance
Project roadmap and AI task details

DataFlowAndState.Description: Global state is centralized in GameManager. Future expansion includes a dedicated EventBroker for decoupled communication and ScriptableObject-based data management for wave and weapon balancing.

StrictConventions.Rule: Focus exclusively on Wave Mode (Turret Defense) development.
Rely on GameManager.Instance for global state; transition to EventBroker for notifications.
Strictly avoid GameObject.Find(); use inspector refs or singletons.
Prefer Unity UI Toolkit for new UI screens.
Use K&R style braces for all C# scripts.
Ensure exactly one empty line at the end of every file.
